title: anthemis werneri subsp. werneri
intro: Anthemis werneri subsp. werneri, also known as Werner's chrysanthemum or Mountain chamomile, is a subspecies of Anthemis werneri, a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and promoting relaxation. The leaves and flowers of Anthemis werneri subsp. werneri contain apigenin and luteolin, flavonoids that contribute to its calming effects and potential health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and improving sleep quality. Anthemis werneri subsp. werneri is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to alleviate stress and promote overall well-being.
